overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through a rainy night in an old western town. The journey progresses from cobblestone streets with parked carriages, through a train station tunnel, and into an expansive railyard with parked freight trains before exiting to rural tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with parked carriages

events.description: exits narrow street into open station courtyard with large tree

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady canter through wet cobblestone streets, navigating around parked carriages

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage parked along the curb

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road reflecting street lamps
wooden carriage with large wheels parked on the left side
multi-story brick structures with lit windows
cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glow
wrought iron fence along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic town, riding along wet cobblestone streets lined with brick buildings. A parked horse-drawn carriage sits on the left as the camera moves forward, eventually opening into a small courtyard with a large tree before approaching the train station.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station approach with wooden loading platforms

events.description: entering dark tunnel underpass, visibility drops significantly
transition from open station platform to enclosed tunnel corridor

agents.ego_description: riding horse onto railway tracks and entering a dark tunnel under the station

entered.detail: large brick station structure with illuminated windows and arched entrance
raised wooden loading platform with support beams
dark arched tunnel opening beneath the station building
metal rails with wooden ties becoming visible on the ground

segments.scene_description: Approaching the train station, the scene transitions from the open courtyard to the station entrance. The camera moves onto railway tracks and enters a dark tunnel underpass, with wooden platforms visible on the right. The lighting shifts from warm street lamps to the dark tunnel interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered railway tunnel under brick bridge

events.description: approaching tunnel exit, distant light visible at end of corridor
exiting tunnel into open railyard with visible steam locomotive

agents.ego_description: galloping through the dark tunnel, emerging into the industrial railyard

entered.detail: dark brick walls with arched ceiling enclosing the track
metal and brick bridge overhead with support girders

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place entirely within a dark, enclosed tunnel with brick walls and overhead bridge structures. The horse rides along gravel railway tracks, moving from darkness toward a distant light at the tunnel exit. The rain is no longer visible overhead, though the ground remains wet.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial railyard with parked freight trains

events.description: passing large steam locomotive on right, temporarily blocking view
entering area with multiple parallel tracks and parked boxcars

agents.ego_description: riding alongside parked trains, navigating through the railyard

notable_agents.action: parked steam locomotive with large boiler and smokestack

entered.detail: large black steam engine with headlamp and cowcatcher
green freight car with 'PACIFIC UNION' painted in white letters
large brick industrial building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a vast industrial railyard, the scene opens up to show multiple tracks and parked freight trains. A large steam locomotive passes by on the right, followed by green 'Pacific Union' boxcars. The area is illuminated by scattered industrial lights while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railway crossing transitioning to countryside

events.description: leaving industrial railyard, entering more rural area with grass
grass and vegetation become prominent between railway tracks

agents.ego_description: riding away from the industrial area into open countryside, following the tracks

entered.detail: tall wooden water tower with conical roof
railway signal posts with red lights
tall grass growing between and alongside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the transition from industrial railyard to rural countryside. The camera rides past the last freight cars and enters an open area with grass growing between the tracks. A water tower stands in the distance as the scene becomes darker and more isolated, with only the railway signals and distant town lights visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rainy town that transitions from historic streets into a dark tunnel and finally opens into a vast industrial railyard. It begins by riding along wet cobblestone streets lined with brick buildings and a parked carriage, moving through a small courtyard with a large tree toward the train station. As the camera reaches the station, the lighting shifts from warm street lamps to deep shadow while the horse moves onto railway tracks and enters a dark, enclosed brick tunnel. The scene then emerges from the tunnel's darkness into a sprawling railyard illuminated by industrial lights, passing a large steam locomotive and green Pacific Union boxcars. Finally, the camera rides past the last freight cars as the industrial landscape gives way to a dark, isolated countryside with grass growing between the tracks and a distant water tower.
